description: Wiki metadata is absent and the workflow initializes meta/state.json plus Meta.md after approved push.
Existing lastProcessedCommit is used as the base for changed commits and repository context.
Existing wiki workspace has uncommitted changes and workspace preparation stops before mutation.
Wiki clone/fetch fails and the workflow reports recovery guidance without marking initialization complete.
Removed source topics become stale candidates that are marked by default and only deleted or renamed after explicit approval.
Push failure leaves page edits local and does not advance visible wiki state.
